response.justification: Maria is an accomplished Staff/Senior Software Developer with extensive experience in general software performance optimization, system architecture, and embedded systems. However, the role of Principal Performance Architect specifically targets cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization for AI accelerators, requiring expertise in SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload analysis on hardware, and hardware-software co-design, areas where her resume shows no direct, specialized experience.
strengths: Over 11 years of software development experience at senior levels.
Proven ability in general software performance optimization.
Experience in designing and building complex systems.
concerns: No direct experience with SoC and IP modeling.
Limited specific experience optimizing deep-learning workloads on AI hardware.
Lacks background in GPU, SIMD, or MIMD architectures relevant to AI accelerators.
